name: Texas Instruments
analysis: TXN has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. Volume is expanding (1.2× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at $331.5100. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry $332.2800, stop $271.1412, target $515.6964 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
